name: Darius Brubeck
abstract: David Darius Brubeck (born June 14, 1947) is an American jazz pianist, author, and educator. He is the son of jazz pianist Dave Brubeck with whom he worked professionally in the 1970s, while also performing in his own bands, the Darius Brubeck Ensemble and Gathering Forces.

interviews.title: Darius Brubeck interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 29, 2024

works.t: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs: Someday My Prince Will Come

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Dave Brubeck Quartet/ Gerry Mulligan Big Band

about_quotes.speaker: Greg Caputo
about_quotes.evidence: You played with him... I was doing a big band show... And I looked to my left and there was Darius Brubeck playing trombone.
about_quotes.doc_title: Greg Caputo interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 14, 1998
